name: agentmail
description: AI-native email infrastructure for coding agents. Create inboxes, send and receive emails, manage threads, and automate email workflows.

interface.longDescription: Give your coding agent its own email inboxes. Create addresses on the fly, send and receive messages, manage threads, handle attachments, and automate email workflows, all through natural language.
defaultPrompt: Create a new project inbox and draft a welcome email.
Check my AgentMail inbox for new messages and summarize unread threads.
Prepare a reply to the latest email in my inbox.
